descriptions.text: The special Director's Cut edition provides previously cut content and new visuals, compared to the original console release. Released as cartridge initially for the SEGA Mega Drive/Genesis in 2022, it has since appeared on cartridge for the Evercade, Nintendo Switch & PlayStation 4 (via Turrican Anthology Vol. 2) and as a streamable game on Antstream.

The Machine has enslaved the galaxy under its tyrannical rule. As Bren McGuire, the last survivor of the United Freedom Forces, it is your duty to destroy the evil forces of the Machine that have devastated the galaxy.
